results.Query: Add new_EK_PORT_78 to ju1.a2.dom. List direct child nodes of ju1.a2.dom in the updated graph. Return a list of child nodes name.
results.Label: capacity planning, level-3, add-list
results.LLM code:
def process_graph(graph_data):
    graph_copy = copy.deepcopy(graph_data)
    graph_copy.add_node('new_EK_PORT_78', type=['EK_PORT'], physical_capacity_bps=1000)
    graph_copy.add_edge('ju1.a2.dom', 'new_EK_PORT_78', type=['RK_CONTAINS'])
    child_nodes = [node[0] for node in graph_copy.nodes(data=True) if any(edge[1]['type'] == ['RK_CONTAINS'] and edge[0] == 'ju1.a2.dom' for edge in graph_copy.edges(data=True) if edge[1] and edge[1]['type'])]
    graph_json = nx.readwrite.json_graph.node_link_data(graph_copy)
    return_object = {'type': 'list', 'data': child_nodes, 'updated_graph': graph_json}
    return return_object
